title: Hall in Tirol, Tyrol — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hall in Tirol, Tyrol: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hall in Tirol is a city in Tyrol with a population of 14,200. A charming medieval town near Innsbruck, home to the Hall Mint Museum and one of Europe’s best-preserved old towns, with a stunning Alpine setting.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
